member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.GameplayConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration class for gameplay-related settings and queries.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.GameplayConfiguration.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Configuration class for gameplay-related settings and queries.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.GameplayConfiguration.IsSupportMultiLockEnabled
member.summary: Can secondary lock targets (other than the character's body) be locked when using the camera lock-on feature? This is true in co-op and false in PvP.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.GameplayConfiguration.IsStrongDamageImmueEnabled
member.summary: Is immunity to strong damage enabled? This would prevent characters from being one-shot by powerful attacks, providing a more balanced gameplay experience. This is true in PvP and false in co-op.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.GameplayConfiguration.EnableCustomCameraArmLength
member.summary: When enabled, allows for a custom camera arm length to be set, which can affect how close or far the camera is from the character. This is true in PvP and false in co-op.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.PatchCategory
member.summary: Category for Harmony patches. Each patch must be assigned to a category.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.PatchCategory.Global
member.summary: Patches in this category are enabled at all times.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.PatchCategory.Connected
member.summary: Patches in this category are only enabled when the player is connected to the server. NOTE: In the current version of the SDK, this category is the same as . In the future, we will add support for enabling/disabling these patches based on the connection state of the player.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.PatchCategory.Disabled
member.summary: Patches in this category are not enabled.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.TamerKind
member.summary: Represents the type of a Tamer (monster).
member.param: Must be a valid monster name.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.TamerKind.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the type of a Tamer (monster).
member.param: Must be a valid monster name.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.TamerKinds
member.summary: Defines constants for Tamer (monster) types.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Configuration.UnitPathUtils.GetUnitPathName(WukongMp.Api.Configuration.TamerKind)
member.summary: Get the path to the unit blueprint for a given tamer kind. This is used for spawning units in the world.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.EcsExtensions.GetComponent``1(b1.BGUActorBaseCS)
member.summary: Get a **game ECS** component of type from the given actor.
member.param: The actor to get the component from.
member.typeparam: The type of the component to get. Must be a subclass of .
member.returns: The component of type if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Jobs.ClearPlayerTamerRefCountJob
member.summary: This job is used to clear tamers for a specific player, typically when they leave the game or the room.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Jobs.ClearPlayerTamerRefCountJob.#ctor(ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId)
member.summary: This job is used to clear tamers for a specific player, typically when they leave the game or the room.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.CreateLocalMainCharacterEntitySystem
member.summary: Creates the MainCharacterEntity corresponding to the locally controlled pawn

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.CreateLocalMainCharacterEntitySystem.#ctor(ReadyM.Relay.Client.State.ClientState,WukongMp.Api.State.WukongPlayerState,WukongMp.Api.WukongEventBus,ReadyM.Api.Multiplayer.Mapping.Data.IComponentFieldMappingRegistry,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Creates the MainCharacterEntity corresponding to the locally controlled pawn

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.DespawnOtherMainCharactersSystem
member.summary: Despawns the pawns corresponding to MainCharacterEntities for other players. Doesn't affect the main players' MainCharacterEntity.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.SpawnOtherMainCharactersSystem
member.summary: Spawns pawns for the MainCharacterEntities corresponding to other players. Doesn't affect the MainCharacterEntity or pawn of the local player.
Spawns pawns for the MainCharacterEntities corresponding to other players. Doesn't affect the MainCharacterEntity or pawn of the local player.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.Tamers.SpawnTamersSystem
member.summary: Spawns pawns for monsters that do not correspond to any current scene pawn. Tamers have local state that indicates whether they require spawning.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.Tamers.SpawnTamersSystem.#ctor(ReadyM.Relay.Client.State.ClientState,WukongMp.Api.GameplayEventRouter,WukongMp.Api.Configuration.GameplayConfiguration)
member.summary: Spawns pawns for monsters that do not correspond to any current scene pawn. Tamers have local state that indicates whether they require spawning.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.FreeCamera.FreeCameraManager.UpdatePawnPositionToCamera
member.summary: Updates the pawn's position to align with the camera's current location in order to load level where the camera is.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Https.BouncyCastleHttpsClient.PutBytesAsync(System.Uri,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a PUT request to upload raw byte data, suitable for Azure Blob Storage with a SAS URL.
member.param: The request URL, including SAS token if applicable.
Required headers, e.g., "x-ms-blob-type: BlockBlob".
The raw file content to upload.
A cancellation token.
member.returns: The HTTP status code of the response.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Https.FileInfo.Name
member.summary: The name of the file.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Https.FileInfo.Content
member.summary: The binary content of the file.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi
member.summary: API for managing world and player saves in Wukong Multiplayer. Supports co-op style operations where each player has their own save file, and there's a shared world save file for all players.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.UploadWorldSaveAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads the world save file to the server. This operation always overwrites the existing world save file on the server, if any. At this point, the server is expected to keep only the most recent world save file for all players.
member.param: The content of the world save file to upload.
Cancellation token to cancel the upload operation.
member.returns: if the save was uploaded successfully, otherwise.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.DownloadWorldSaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the world save file from the server.
member.param: Cancellation token to cancel the download operation.
member.returns: The content of the world save file if the download was successful, otherwise.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.UploadPlayerSaveAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads the player's save file to the server. This operation always overwrites the existing save file on the server, if any. At this point, the server is expected to keep only the most recent save file for each player.
member.param: The content of the save file to upload.
Cancellation token to cancel the upload operation.
member.returns: if the save was uploaded successfully, otherwise.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.DownloadPlayerSaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the player's save file from the server. This operation is expected to return the most recent save file for the player, if any.
member.param: Cancellation token to cancel the download operation.
member.returns: The content of the player's save file if the download was successful, otherwise.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.Logging
member.summary: Provides static logging methods that can be used throughout the codebase without needing to inject a logger instance.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogTrace(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs a trace message. This method is only active in DEBUG builds and will be stripped out in release builds to avoid performance overhead.
member.param: The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in").
The arguments to be formatted into the message template.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogDebug(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs a debug message. This method is only active in DEBUG builds and will be stripped out in release builds to avoid performance overhead.
member.param: The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in").
The arguments to be formatted into the message template.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogInformation(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs an informational message. This method is active in all build configurations and is suitable for logging general information about the mod's operation.
member.param: The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in").
The arguments to be formatted into the message template.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogWarning(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs a warning message. This method is active in all build configurations and is suitable for logging potential issues or important events that are not necessarily errors.
member.param: The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in").
The arguments to be formatted into the message template.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogError(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs an error message. This method is active in all build configurations and is suitable for logging errors or exceptions that occur during the mod's operation.
member.param: The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in").
The arguments to be formatted into the message template.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogError(System.Exception,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs an error message along with an exception. This method is active in all build configurations and is suitable for logging errors or exceptions that occur during the mod's operation, providing additional context from the exception.
member.param: The exception to log. This can be null if no exception is being logged, but the method will still log the message and arguments.
The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in"). This parameter is optional and can be null, in which case only the exception will be logged.
The arguments to be formatted into the message template. This parameter is optional and can be empty if no additional context is needed.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogCritical(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs a critical error message. This method is active in all build configurations and is suitable for logging critical errors or exceptions that occur during the mod's operation, indicating a severe failure that may result in shutdown or data loss.
member.param: The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in").
The arguments to be formatted into the message template.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogCritical(System.Exception,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs a critical error message along with an exception. This method is active in all build configurations and is suitable for logging critical errors or exceptions that occur during the mod's operation, providing additional context from the exception and indicating a severe failure that may result in shutdown or data loss.
member.param: The exception to log. This can be null if no exception is being logged, but the method will still log the message and arguments.

The message template to log. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in"). This parameter is optional and can be null, in which case only the exception will be logged, but the log entry will still be marked as critical.
The arguments to be formatted into the message template. This parameter is optional and can be empty if no additional context is needed.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Logging.LogException(System.Exception,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Logs an exception with an optional message and arguments. This method is a convenience wrapper around LogError that allows you to log an exception along with a custom message and structured arguments. If the message is null, it will default to "An exception occurred". This method is active in all build configurations and is suitable for logging exceptions that occur during the mod's operation, providing additional context from the exception and any relevant information through the message and arguments.
member.param: The exception to log.
An optional message template to log alongside the exception. Use structured logging syntax (e.g., "User {UserId} logged in"). If null, a default message will be used.
The arguments to be formatted into the message template. This parameter is optional and can be empty if no additional context is needed.

members.member: Null when the summoner is a BGU_QuestActor or other unmapped actor

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.AntiStallWarning
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Engage!.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.BlueTeam
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Team Blue.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.BotName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bot.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraDownControls
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Q.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraDownDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Down.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraMoveControls
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to W S A D.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraMoveDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Move.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraRotateControls
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to RMB.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraRotateDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Rotate.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraSwitchControls
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ←/→.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraSwitchDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Switch player.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraUpControls
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to E.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraUpDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Up.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ChatHelperDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ENTER - Type/Send | K - Hide/Show Chat.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ChatHelperNoSendDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to K - Hide/Show Event Log.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CheatsAreDisabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cheats are disabled.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CheatsDisabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cheats disabled.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CheatsEnabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cheats enabled.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CommandHelperDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ENTER - Type | F1 - Hide/Show.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Connected
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Players in zone.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ConnectionRejectedByServer
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Connection rejected by server.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CustomSpiritCooldown
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} set spirit cooldown to {1} s.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Disconnected
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Disconnected.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ExecutionError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Execution error: {0}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.HintCommandsUse
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press F1 to use commands.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InfManaDisabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} disabled infinite mana.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InfManaEnabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} enabled infinite mana.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InfSpiritDisabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} disabled infinite spirit energy.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InfSpiritEnabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} enabled infinite spirit energy.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} disabled infinite transform energy.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} disabled infinite vessel energy.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InfVesselEnabled

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to In Multiplayer Lobby.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InstantCooldownDisabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} disabled instant skill cooldown.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InstantCooldownEnabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} enabled instant skill cooldown.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InvalidArgumentFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid argument format: {0}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InvalidArgumentType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid argument at index {0}. Expected {1}, got {2}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InvalidCommand
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid command: {0}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InvalidCommandFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid command format: {0}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InvalidCooldown
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid cooldown value.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.MasterClient
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Master client: {0}.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to WukongMP.pak is missing.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.More
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to more.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} is not ready.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PlayerIsReady

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} killed {1}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PlayerLeft
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} has left!.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PlayerRequestedRebirth
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} requested rebirth.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PressToBeNotReady
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press J to be not ready.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PressToBeReady
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press J to be ready.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PressToCancelMatch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press I to cancel match.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PressToPlayWithBots
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press I to play with bots.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PressToSwitchTeam
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press L to switch team.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Ready
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Ready.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.RedTeam
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Team Red.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.RoundCount
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Round {0} of {1}.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Round ended. Draw.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.RoundEndedWinner
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Round ended. {0} won.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Severe packet loss detected!.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Softlock. Use /softlock command to respawn.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Spectators
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Spectators.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.StallingMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Stalling - losing HP.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.StartingGame
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Starting PvP match.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Too few arguments: min {0}, actual {1}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.TooManyArguments
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Too many arguments: max {0}, actual {1}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.TournamentDraw
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Draw.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.TournamentEndedWinner

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.UnrecognizedCommand

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.WaitForEnd
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait for the match to end.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.WaitForOtherPlayers
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait for other players.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.WaitForOtherPlayersCount
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait for other players ({0}/{1}).

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.YouAreReady
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to You are ready.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase
member.summary: Base class for UI widgets defined in .pak files.
member.param: The path to the widget, relative to the "Content/UI" folder in the .pak files. For example, for a widget located at "Content/UI/MyWidget.uasset", the path would be "MyWidget".

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base class for UI widgets defined in .pak files.
member.param: The path to the widget, relative to the "Content/UI" folder in the .pak files. For example, for a widget located at "Content/UI/MyWidget.uasset", the path would be "MyWidget".

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the widget by trying to find it first, and if it doesn't exist, spawns a new one.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.SetVisibility(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the visibility of the widget. This requires the widget to be initialized first, otherwise it will do nothing.
member.param: Whether the widget should be visible or not.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.Deinitialize
member.summary: Removes the widget from the viewport and sets the reference to null.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.USharpExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for Unreal Engine types and other helper methods.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.WukongEventBus
member.summary: Exposes events related to level transitions, such as loading, playing, and exiting levels. This allows mods to hook into these events and perform actions at the appropriate times during the level lifecycle.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.WukongUtils.GameUtils
member.summary: Provides utility methods for directly interacting with the game world, bypassing the SDK.
member.remarks: These methods are not guaranteed to be stable across game updates, and might be removed in the future.
